main.description: A bookable time-window at a venue. Authored by the venue's owning DID. Slots are open by default; an organizer claims a slot by publishing an app.hekate.event referencing it. Slots derived from a recurrence carry the recurrence AT-URI for traceability but are still independently addressable records.

venue.description: AT-URI of the app.hekate.venue this slot belongs to. MUST be authored by the same DID as this slot.

recurrence.description: Optional AT-URI of the app.hekate.recurrence that produced this slot. Indexers MAY use this to garbage-collect derived slots when the recurrence is updated.

status.description: open: claimable. claimed: an event references this slot. cancelled: the venue has withdrawn the slot. The venue owner sets the initial status; transition to claimed is performed by the indexer when it observes a valid app.hekate.event referencing this slot.

claimedBy.description: Set by the indexer (NOT by clients) when status transitions to claimed. AT-URI of the winning app.hekate.event. Multiple events racing for the same slot are resolved by earliest createdAt; losers are surfaced off-PDS by the indexer.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes from the venue owner about this specific slot.
